mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservation_policies WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND active = TRUE AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation_policies WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND resource_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT * FROM reservation_policies WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM reservation_policies WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation_policies (resource_id, slot_minutes, advance_days, min_duration_minutes, max_duration_minutes, cancel_deadline_minutes, check_in_window_minutes, requires_approval, approval_level, active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{resourceId}, #{slotMinutes}, #{advanceDays}, #{minDurationMinutes}, #{maxDurationMinutes}, #{cancelDeadlineMinutes}, #{checkInWindowMinutes}, #{requiresApproval}, #{approvalLevel}, #{active}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation_policies SET resource_id = #{resourceId}, slot_minutes = #{slotMinutes}, advance_days = #{advanceDays}, min_duration_minutes = #{minDurationMinutes}, max_duration_minutes = #{maxDurationMinutes}, cancel_deadline_minutes = #{cancelDeadlineMinutes}, check_in_window_minutes = #{checkInWindowMinutes}, requires_approval = #{requiresApproval}, approval_level = #{approvalLevel}, active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE reservation_policies SET deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
